verification_plan.objective: Plan verification for 3.3 V regulator output nominal value and tolerance claim at rail.vout.
verification_plan.method_assignment_rationale: Quantitative claim has approved source authority and quantitative packet support; planning can define analytic comparison criteria without execution.

verification_plan.objective: Plan simulation-readiness verification for startup transient requirement before any execution is considered.
